questions.question: What three compounding bottlenecks hit DeepSeek-V3's 2,048-GPU training?
options: Activation memory pressure (8k sequences, 61 layers), pipeline bubbles (~12% idle even with 1F1B at 8 stages), and cross-node MoE all-to-all reaching a 1:1 compute-to-communication ratio
Slow disks, small RAM, old drivers
Checkpoint size, eval time, and logging
questions.explanation: Each had separate fixes (checkpointing, Zero Bubble, comm kernels); DualPipe's contribution is making them play together — over 95% GPU utilization across the 14.8T-token run.

questions.question: What is the pipeline-bubble problem?
options: With layers split across P devices, each stage idles waiting for the previous stage's output (forward) or the next stage's gradient (backward) — GPipe wasted most GPU time; 1F1B interleaving and Zero Bubble's B/W backward split progressively tightened it
Batches being too large to fit
questions.explanation: Zero Bubble (Sea AI Lab 2023) split backward into backward-for-input and backward-for-weights to fill idle slots; DualPipe is the next step on that lineage.

questions.question: What are the four components of a DualPipe chunk, and how do they overlap?
options: Attention, all-to-all dispatch, MoE MLP, and all-to-all combine — scheduled so dispatch comms run in parallel with the next chunk's attention compute, and combine comms run under the following chunk's MLP
questions.explanation: The decomposition is what creates overlap windows: each communication phase hides inside a neighboring chunk's compute phase instead of blocking the pipeline.

questions.question: What is the "dual" in DualPipe, and why is its cost acceptable?
options: Micro-batches inject from BOTH pipeline ends, so device i must hold both early-layer i and late-layer P−1−i — a 2x replication of non-expert parameters that's cheap because Expert Parallelism already spreads the MoE experts (most of the weights) thin across ranks
questions.explanation: Bidirectional streams fill each other's idle slots. The replicated dense layers are small potatoes next to the sharded expert weights.

questions.question: What trade does DualPipeV (Sea AI Lab, 2025) make?
options: It drops the 2x parameter replication at the cost of a marginally larger bubble when Expert Parallelism is inactive — the refinement for setups where the dual copy isn't already amortized
questions.explanation: The variant choice tracks your parallelism mix: with heavy EP, DualPipe's replication is free; without it, DualPipeV's tighter memory wins.
